sections.label: Introduction Text
sections.value: PerAnkh is more than an organization—it's a movement dedicated to spiritual awakening, healing, and the decriminalization of entheogens. Based in Detroit, we are committed to advocating for the sacred use of plant medicines while providing education, community support, and safe spaces for exploration.

value.title: Provide access to sacred plant medicine practices
Build a thriving community rooted in healing and transformation

sections.label: Impact Text
sections.value: Every contribution, big or small, fuels the vision of a world where natural medicines are recognized, respected, and accessible to those seeking spiritual and personal growth.

sections.label: Bookstore Subtitle
sections.value: Expand your consciousness with transformative literature from our curated collection of sacred texts and consciousness-expanding works.

value.title: Sacred Mushroom Rituals
value.subtitle: The Search for the Blood of Quetzalcoatl
value.author: Tom Lane
value.description: Embark on a profound journey into the ancient wisdom of sacred mushroom rituals and the mystical quest for Quetzalcoatl's divine essence.
